title: Record a completed timed focus session for a goal
description: Verifies a user can complete a timed focus session, mark achieved with notes, and the session is recorded for the selected goal.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a valid type and title
Navigate to /session
Start a timed focus session for the created goal
Complete the session and proceed to save
Mark the goal as achieved and fill unique text into the notes field
Save the session record
Verify the session is listed as recorded for the goal

title: Create a new goal and see it in the goals list
description: Verifies a user can create a goal with required fields and it appears in the goals list.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Start creating a new goal
Select a goal type
Fill unique text into the goal title field
Save the goal
Verify the newly created goal appears in the goals list

title: Spawn child goals from a parent plan and see hierarchy updated
description: Verifies a user can add a plan to a parent goal, spawn child goals, and the spawned children appear under the parent in the hierarchy.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new parent goal with a valid type and title
Open the parent goal
Add a plan to the parent goal with at least one child item suitable for spawning
Spawn child goals from the plan
Verify spawned child goals are displayed under the parent goal in the hierarchy

title: Add a daily simple session and mark it done
description: Verifies a user can add a daily simple session for a daily goal and mark it done with the status updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new daily goal with a valid title
Open the daily goal details
Add a daily simple session
Mark the daily simple session as done
Verify the daily simple session shows a done status for the day

title: Dashboard rollups persist across reload
description: Verifies dashboard rollups computed from local data remain present after a page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a valid type and title
Navigate to /session
Start a timed focus session for the created goal
Complete the session and save it with achieved status and notes
Navigate to /
Reload the page
Verify dashboard aggregates reflect the recorded session
Verify the dashboard displays trends for the recorded activity

title: Edit an existing goal and see updates reflected in the list
description: Verifies a user can update a goal and the goals list reflects the saved changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a valid type and title
Open the created goal for editing
Update the goal title with new unique text
Save changes
Verify the goals list shows the updated goal title

title: Add a daily simple session and mark it missed with a note
description: Verifies a user can add a daily simple session, mark it missed, provide a note, and see the missed status updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new daily goal with a valid title
Open the daily goal details
Add a daily simple session
Mark the daily simple session as missed
Fill unique text into the missed note field
Save the daily simple session update
Verify the daily simple session shows a missed status for the day

title: Record an early-ended timed session as skipped with a reason
description: Verifies a user can end a timed session early, mark it skipped with a required reason, and the saved record shows as skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a valid type and title
Navigate to /session
Start a timed focus session for the created goal
End the session early
Mark the session as skipped and fill unique text into the skip reason field
Save the session record
Verify the session is recorded as skipped for the goal

title: Save a daily life journal entry with content
description: Verifies a user can enter content into at least one daily life journal field, save, and then see the saved entry for the current date.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Click to open the Daily journal section
Fill a short sentence into one life journal field
Submit the save action for the daily life journal entry
Verify a saved daily life journal entry is displayed for the current date

title: Create a failure attached to a goal with a required note
description: Verifies a user can log a failure linked to a specific goal with a required note and see it appear in the failures list with goal context.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Failure Goal 1
Navigate to /failures
Start creating a new failure entry
Select the option to link the failure to a goal
Select the goal titled Failure Goal 1
Fill a clear sentence into the failure note field
Submit the save action for the failure
Verify the new failure appears in the list and indicates it is linked to the selected goal

title: Restore a deleted goal from Trash back to active goals
description: Verifies a user can delete a goal, find it in Trash under the correct grouping, restore it, and see it available again in the active goals list.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Trash Restore Goal 1
Delete the goal titled Trash Restore Goal 1
Navigate to /trash
Browse the trash grouping for goals
Select the deleted item for Trash Restore Goal 1 to restore
Confirm the restore action
Navigate to /goals
Verify the goal titled Trash Restore Goal 1 is present in the active goals list

title: Save a goal-linked journal Q&A for a selected timeframe and goal
description: Verifies a user can select a timeframe and a goal, answer the goal journal questions, save, and see the entry listed as linked to the chosen goal and date.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Goal Journal Target 1
Navigate to /journal
Click to open the Goals journal section
Select a valid timeframe option
Select the goal titled Goal Journal Target 1
Fill in answers for the goal journal questions
Submit the save action for the goal-linked journal entry
Verify a goal-linked journal entry is displayed in the list for the selected goal and date

title: Create a failure attached to a specific session with a required note
description: Verifies a user can create a focus session, then log a failure linked to that session with a required note and see it appear with session context.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Session Failure Goal 1
Navigate to /session
Select the goal titled Session Failure Goal 1 for the session
Start a timed focus session
End the session using the in-app completion/stop control
Navigate to /failures
Start creating a new failure entry
Select the option to link the failure to a session
Select the most recent session for Session Failure Goal 1
Fill a clear sentence into the failure note field
Submit the save action for the failure
Verify the new failure appears in the list and indicates it is linked to the selected session

title: Restore a deleted session from Trash back to sessions history
description: Verifies a user can create and end a session, delete it, restore it from Trash, and see it return to the session list linked to its goal.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Trash Restore Session Goal 1
Navigate to /session
Select the goal titled Trash Restore Session Goal 1 for the session
Start a timed focus session
End the session using the in-app completion/stop control
Delete the most recent session from the session list/history
Navigate to /trash
Browse the trash grouping for sessions
Select the deleted session item to restore
Confirm the restore action
Navigate to /session
Verify the restored session is visible in the session list and associated with Trash Restore Session Goal 1

title: View dashboard overview with aggregates and trends
description: Verifies the dashboard loads and displays aggregate progress and trend visualizations for the current timeframe.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify dashboard aggregate metrics are displayed
Verify at least one trends visualization is displayed

title: Export a full JSON backup of user data
description: This test verifies a user can export a full JSON backup from the export controls and the browser initiates a download.
category: Export and data control (PDF summary, full backup, system wipe)

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with title Backup Seed Goal and a valid timeframe
Open the layout export controls from the sidebar
Choose Export Full Backup
Confirm export
Verify a JSON backup export is generated and a download is initiated

title: Export a PDF summary for a selected goal
description: This test verifies a user can create a goal and generate a PDF summary export for that goal from the export controls.
category: Export and data control (PDF summary, full backup, system wipe)

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with title Goal Export Target and a valid timeframe
Open the layout export controls from the sidebar
Choose Export Summary (PDF)
Select the goal named Goal Export Target for export
Generate the PDF summary
Verify a PDF export is generated and a download is initiated

title: Filter dashboard by timeframe and see updated trends
description: Verifies changing the selected timeframe updates the dashboard aggregates and trend visualizations accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a different timeframe filter on the dashboard
Verify the displayed aggregate metrics update to reflect the selected timeframe
Verify the trend visualization updates to reflect the selected timeframe

title: Edit an existing failure note and context
description: Verifies a user can open a previously created failure, change its note or linked context, save, and see the updated failure reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Failure Edit Goal A
Create a new goal with a unique title like Failure Edit Goal B
Navigate to /failures
Start creating a new failure entry
Select the option to link the failure to a goal
Select the goal titled Failure Edit Goal A
Fill a note like Initial failure note into the failure note field
Submit the save action for the failure
Open the newly created failure for editing
Update the failure note to a different sentence
Change the linked goal to Failure Edit Goal B
Submit the save action for the edited failure
Verify the failure list shows the updated note and that the failure is now linked to Failure Edit Goal B

title: System wipe clears local data and reloads to empty state
description: This test verifies a user can complete the explicit system wipe confirmation flow and the app reloads with local data cleared to an empty state.
category: Export and data control (PDF summary, full backup, system wipe)

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with title Wipe Me Goal and a valid timeframe
Open the layout export controls from the sidebar
Choose System Wipe
Read the confirmation instructions
Confirm the wipe explicitly
Verify the app reloads and shows an empty state with no existing goals

title: Prevent saving a goal without a required title
description: Verifies the goal form blocks saving when the required title is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Start creating a new goal
Select a goal type
Leave the goal title field empty
Attempt to save the goal
Verify a title validation error is visible
Verify the new goal is not added to the goals list

title: Purge items permanently from Trash with explicit confirmation
description: Verifies a user can permanently purge one or more trashed items after explicit confirmation and they no longer appear in Trash.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Trash Purge Goal 1
Delete the goal titled Trash Purge Goal 1
Navigate to /trash
Select the trashed item for Trash Purge Goal 1
Choose the action to purge permanently
Complete the explicit confirmation required to permanently purge
Verify the purged item no longer appears in the trash list

title: System wipe cancellation leaves data intact
description: This test verifies cancelling the system wipe flow leaves existing local data intact and available in the app.
category: Export and data control (PDF summary, full backup, system wipe)

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with title Keep Me Goal and a valid timeframe
Open the layout export controls from the sidebar
Choose System Wipe
Cancel and close the wipe flow
Refresh the page
Verify the goal named Keep Me Goal is still present in the goals list

title: Prevent saving an empty daily life journal entry
description: Verifies the daily life journal cannot be saved when all fields are empty and a validation message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /journal
Click to open the Daily journal section
Ensure all life journal fields are empty
Submit the save action for the daily life journal entry
Verify a validation error is visible indicating content is required and the entry is not saved

title: Export summary flow allows cancelling without exporting
description: This test verifies a user can open the PDF summary export flow and cancel without generating an export.
category: Export and data control (PDF summary, full backup, system wipe)

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with title Cancel Export Goal and a valid timeframe
Open the layout export controls from the sidebar
Choose Export Summary (PDF)
Cancel and close the export flow
Verify no export is generated and the user returns to normal app navigation

title: Prevent saving a failure without a note
description: Verifies the failure form blocks saving when the note is empty and shows a validation message explaining a note is required.

steps.description: Navigate to /goals
Create a new goal with a unique title like Failure Note Required Goal 1
Navigate to /failures
Start creating a new failure entry
Select the option to link the failure to a goal
Select the goal titled Failure Note Required Goal 1
Ensure the failure note field is empty
Submit the save action for the failure
Verify a validation error is visible indicating a note is required and the failure is not created

title: When auth is disabled, /login redirects to the dashboard without signing in
description: This test verifies that in auth-disabled environments visiting the login route redirects to the dashboard without requiring sign-in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Successful email/password login lands on the dashboard
description: This test verifies a user can sign in with email and password via the login page and is taken to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit login credentials
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
